'''tochafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:pianocentric|pianocentric]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-ch-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pianocentric|pianocentric]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tochafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || tochafithi || tochafiji || tochafishi || tochafiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || tochafuthu || tochafuju || tochafushu || tochafuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || tochafuthu || tochafuju || tochafushu || tochafuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || tochafufthuf || tochafufjuf || tochafufshuf || tochafufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || tochafethe || tochafeje || tochafeshe || tochafeke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || tochafotho || tochafojo || tochafosho || tochafoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || tochafotho || tochafojo || tochafosho || tochafoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || tochafofthof || tochafofjof || tochafofshof || tochafofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || tochafïfthïf || tochafïfjïf || tochafïfshïf || tochafïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || tochafïfthïf || tochafïfjïf || tochafïfshïf || tochafïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || tochafïfthïf || tochafïfjïf || tochafïfshïf || tochafïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || tochafïfthïf || tochafïfjïf || tochafïfshïf || tochafïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || tochafæthæ || tochafæjæ || tochafæshæ || tochafækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || tochafatha || tochafaja || tochafasha || tochafaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || tochafatha || tochafaja || tochafasha || tochafaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || tochafafthaf || tochafafjaf || tochafafshaf || tochafafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || tochafasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || tochafshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || tochafroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || tochafmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || tochafyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gotochafnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gotochafnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gotochafnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gotochafnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || tochachafasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || tochachafshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || tochachafroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || tochachafmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || tochachafyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gotochachafnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gotochachafnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gotochachafnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gotochachafnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || techæfasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || techæfshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || techæfroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || techæfmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || techæfyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gotechæfnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gotechæfnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gotechæfnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gotechæfnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || tochfafasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || tochfafshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || tochfafroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || tochfafmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || tochfafyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gotochfafnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gotochfafnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gotochfafnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gotochfafnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
